title: Patient-Reported Outcomes
description: Browse and administer validated Patient-Reported Outcome (PRO) instruments including PHQ-9, GAD-7, KCCQ-12, PROMIS, and custom questionnaires. PRO data collected here is stored in the OMOP CDM Observation domain.
tips: Select an instrument from the library to view its scoring methodology, validated use cases, and OMOP concept mappings.
Use the Send Survey button to distribute an instrument to a patient cohort via the secure survey portal.
Completed surveys are automatically scored and written to the OMOP Observation table with the appropriate concept IDs.
Filter by domain (depression, anxiety, cardiac, etc.) to find instruments relevant to your study population.
KCCQ-12 is recommended for cardiac outcomes research; PHQ-9 and GAD-7 for mental health screening.
